cases.name: datetime_translator_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE trigger_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            date_col DATE,
            time_col TIME,
            timestamp_col TIMESTAMP
        )

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT name, sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'trigger' AND name LIKE '__pgsqlite_datetime%'

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-3
cases.sql:
SELECT column_name, pg_type, sqlite_type FROM __pgsqlite_schema 
         WHERE table_name = 'trigger_test' AND pg_type IN ('date', 'time', 'timestamp')

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-5
cases.sql:
SELECT typeof(date_col), typeof(time_col), typeof(timestamp_col) 
         FROM trigger_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(date_col AS TEXT), CAST(time_col AS TEXT), CAST(timestamp_col AS TEXT) FROM trigger_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-7
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE translator_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            date_col DATE
        )

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-8
cases.sql: INSERT INTO translator_test VALUES (1, '2024-01-15')

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT typeof(date_col) FROM translator_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_translator_test-10
cases.sql: SELECT date_col FROM translator_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: extract_debug_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT 1

cases.name: extract_debug_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT extract('year', 1686840645.0) as year

cases.name: extract_minimal_test-1
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ts REAL)

cases.name: extract_minimal_test-2
cases.sql: INSERT INTO test_dates (id, ts) VALUES (1, 1686840645.0)

cases.name: extract_minimal_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM to_timestamp(ts)) as year FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1

cases.name: extract_minimal_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM to_timestamp(1686840645.0)) as year

cases.name: datetime_functions_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT NOW() as now

cases.name: datetime_functions_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT CURRENT_DATE as today

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-1
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE test_events (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ts REAL)

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-2
cases.sql: INSERT INTO test_events (id, ts) VALUES (1, 1686840645.0)

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM test_events

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM 1686840645.0)

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT extract('year', ts) FROM test_events WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ts) FROM test_events WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_query_debug_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT ts FROM test_events WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_working_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT CURRENT_DATE

cases.name: datetime_working_test-3
cases.sql: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ts DOUBLE PRECISION)

cases.name: datetime_working_test-4
cases.sql: INSERT INTO timestamps (id, ts) VALUES ($1, $2)

cases.name: datetime_working_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT to_timestamp(ts) FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_working_test-6
cases.sql:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM to_timestamp(ts)) as year,
                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM to_timestamp(ts)) as month,
                EXTRACT(DAY FROM to_timestamp(ts)) as day,
                EXTRACT(HOUR FROM to_timestamp(ts)) as hour,
                EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM to_timestamp(ts)) as minute
         FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_working_test-9
cases.sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', to_timestamp(ts)) as hour_trunc,
                DATE_TRUNC('day', to_timestamp(ts)) as day_trunc,
                DATE_TRUNC('month', to_timestamp(ts)) as month_trunc
         FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_working_test-12
cases.sql:
SELECT to_timestamp(ts) + 86400000000 as tomorrow,
                to_timestamp(ts) - 3600000000 as hour_ago
         FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-1
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_storage_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            date_col DATE,
            time_col TIME,
            timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,
            timestamptz_col TIMESTAMPTZ,
            timetz_col TIMETZ,
            interval_col INTERVAL,
            datetime_col DATETIME
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='main.datetime_storage_test'

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT cid, name, type FROM pragma_table_info('datetime_storage_test') ORDER BY cid

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-4
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_aliases_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            ts_with_tz TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
            ts_without_tz TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE,
            time_with_tz TIME WITH TIME ZONE,
            time_without_tz TIME WITHOUT TIME ZONE,
            mixed_case_date DaTe,
            mixed_case_time TiMe,
            mixed_case_timestamp TiMeStAmP
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT name, type FROM pragma_table_info('datetime_aliases_test') WHERE name != 'id' ORDER BY cid

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-6
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_metadata_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            date_col DATE,
            time_col TIME,
            timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,
            timestamptz_col TIMESTAMPTZ,
            timetz_col TIMETZ,
            interval_col INTERVAL
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-7
cases.sql:
SELECT column_name, pg_type, sqlite_type 
         FROM __pgsqlite_schema 
         WHERE table_name = 'datetime_metadata_test' 
         AND column_name != 'id'
         ORDER BY column_name

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-8
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_values_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            date_col DATE,
            time_col TIME,
            timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,
            timestamptz_col TIMESTAMPTZ,
            timetz_col TIMETZ,
            interval_col INTERVAL
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-10
cases.sql:
SELECT 
            typeof(date_col) as date_type,
            typeof(time_col) as time_type,
            typeof(timestamp_col) as timestamp_type,
            typeof(timestamptz_col) as timestamptz_type,
            typeof(timetz_col) as timetz_type,
            typeof(interval_col) as interval_type,
            date_col as date_raw,
            time_col as time_raw,
            timestamp_col as timestamp_raw,
            timestamptz_col as timestamptz_raw,
            timetz_col as timetz_raw,
            interval_col as interval_raw
         FROM datetime_values_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT date_col, time_col, timestamp_col FROM datetime_values_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-12
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_constraints_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at TIMESTAMP,
            birth_date DATE CHECK (birth_date > '1900-01-01'),
            work_start TIME DEFAULT '09:00:00',
            meeting_time TIMETZ
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-13
cases.sql:
SELECT name, type FROM pragma_table_info('datetime_constraints_test') 
         WHERE name != 'id' ORDER BY cid

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-14
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_array_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            dates DATE[]
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-15
cases.sql: CREATE DOMAIN positive_date AS DATE CHECK (VALUE > '2000-01-01')

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-16
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_complex_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            nullable_date DATE NULL,
            not_null_time TIME NOT NULL,
            unique_timestamp TIMESTAMP UNIQUE,
            primary_key_date DATE PRIMARY KEY
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-17
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_long_names_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            this_is_a_very_long_column_name_for_a_date_field DATE,
            another_extremely_long_column_name_for_timestamp_with_timezone TIMESTAMPTZ
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-18
cases.sql:
SELECT name, type FROM pragma_table_info('datetime_long_names_test') 
         WHERE name != 'id' ORDER BY cid

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-19
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE datetime_limitations_test (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            date_col DATE,
            time_col TIME,
            timestamp_col TIMESTAMP
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-20
cases.sql: INSERT INTO datetime_limitations_test VALUES (1, '2024-01-15', '14:30:00', '2024-01-15 14:30:00')

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-21
cases.sql:
SELECT typeof(date_col), typeof(time_col), typeof(timestamp_col) 
         FROM datetime_limitations_test WHERE id = 1

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-22
cases.sql:
CREATE TABLE "DateTime Special Table" (
            "ID Column" INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            "Date Column!" DATE,
            "Time (with parens)" TIME,
            "Timestamp @ Special" TIMESTAMP
        )

cases.name: datetime_storage_type_test-23
cases.sql:
SELECT name, type FROM pragma_table_info('"DateTime Special Table"') 
           WHERE name != 'ID Column' ORDER BY cid
